title: aegilops elongata
intro: Aegilops elongata, also known as the elongated goat grass, is a type of wild grass belonging to the wheat family (Poaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Aegilops elongata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional cooking in some parts of the world.
